WhatsApp
Adapter / Labour

For vehicles with bottom battery mounting, Tsapa Adapter is available at $15 per set.

Service station labour charges is around $20 for most cars where batteries are accessible (i.e.. engine bay, trunk)

Battery Terminals

There are two sizes of terminals predominant in car batteries DIN & JIS.

Tsapa battery includes DIN terminal but service stations are equipped with both terminals.

For distribution
To become an authorised service center in Singapore please contact:
Fitinparts PTE LTD
Address:
1 Kaki Bukit Rd 1 Enterprise One
#03-10/11, Singapore 415934
Web store:
www.fitinpart.sg
In Singapore, Fitinparts provides product support for TSAPA Batteries.
Tel:
+6590487060
WhatsApp
Solateks Pte Ltd
(Material Handing, Marine & ESS/UPS applications)
Address:
1 Kaki Bukit Rd 1 Enterprise One
#03-10/11, Singapore 415934
Web store:
https://www.solateks.com/
In Singapore, Fitinparts provides product support for TSAPA Batteries.
Tel:
+65 6206 5170
WhatsApp
